questions.text: What security vulnerability does this Python code introduce?
Which vulnerability is present in this Node.js code?
What security issue exists in this authentication check?
options: JWT signature verification is disabled — tokens are not verified

questions.text: What type of attack does this bash snippet perform?
questions.code:
#!/bin/bash
TARGET="192.168.1.1"
for port in $(seq 1 1024); do
  (echo > /dev/tcp/$TARGET/$port) 2>/dev/null && \
    echo "[+] Port $port is OPEN"
done

questions.text: UDP guarantees delivery of packets and ensures they arrive in order.
